Customer Sally Dominguez at ADBL, HBL conducted Cash Withdrawal transfer transaction totaling NPR 21807.13 on 2022-10-07 to Henry King. During the branch's periodic transaction-monitoring review, the compliance desk at ADBL examined the account held by Sally Dominguez after an internal threshold alert was triggered. For context, the customer's KYC file lists a modest declared income profile; in the reviewing officer's judgement the velocity and aggregate value of the funds are not fully consistent with that profile. Nonetheless, a number of the transfers appear to have been deliberately kept below reporting thresholds and were executed in rapid succession, a pattern the officer considers consistent with Cash Withdrawal.
